{{Quote|Ah. Ved. Help me.|The unidentified zone runner's last words, to [[Ved Tarson]]|<ref name="Rebellion 6">[[Rebellion 6|''Rebellion'' 6]]</ref>}}
This '''unidentified zone runner''' was one of the [[zone runner]]s on an unidentified [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] world, where he fought against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He worked as a team with [[Ved Tarson|Ved]] and [[Wyl Tarson]].

As a zone runner, he would sprint from cover through the field of battle, fling a sack of explosives onto an advancing Imperial [[Juggernaut]], and let the crude bomb cripple its drive mechanisms or destroy the machine entirely. The explosives, however, were of unreliable make and could explode unexpectedly. On one run, they did just that, killing him and throwing Wyl into the path of one of the Juggernauts.

==Appearances==
*[[Rebellion 6|''Rebellion'' 6]] {{1st}} {{Flash}}
